footer.tagline: Real connections in a digital world.

about.hero_title: Bridge the gap between digital discovery and physical interaction.
about.hero_subtitle: We are building a premium platform to revolutionize how people connect in the real world. Our mission is to take you off the screen and into meaningful, face-to-face conversations.
about.value_minimalist_text: We remove friction so you can focus on what matters. Every element on our platform serves a purpose to guide your journey effortlessly.
about.value_experience_text: From a curated list of events to a premium feel across all devices, we ensure your time spent here is intuitive, beautiful, and flawless.
about.value_connectivity_text: We believe the best relationships are built in person. Our platform is just the starting point for your next great authentic connection.
about.for_individuals_text: Looking for authentic, face-to-face connections? Discover curated speed dating events and expand your social circle without the endless swiping.
about.for_organizers_text: Seeking a clean, high-traffic platform to list your events? Reach a targeted audience ready to engage and connect in the real world.
about.cta_subtitle: Explore upcoming events near you today.

cookie_banner.title: We value your privacy
cookie_banner.text: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. By clicking "Accept", you consent to the use of cookies on our site for analysis and metrics (including Google Analytics).
